meaning: n.桶,一桶的量,[桶壮物]铲斗
examples: We let the bucket down by a rope.
She ran hot water into the bucket.
She threw a bucket of water over them.
After finishing the bucket, my Mexican friends asked if I was ready to try pure pulque.
But while creating that bucket list, my pain, aloneness, and fears were replaced with the gift of forgetting.
